contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Deferred Until column on Hit List + DApp editor + GAS scanner + cron migration
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/199
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/267
  
  Details:
  Round 2 of the Deferred / Revisit later auto-flip work — added a dedicated Deferred Until column to Hit List so the cron's resurface date is single-purpose (Follow Up Date is no longer overloaded for two semantic uses).
  
  What changed:
  
  Hit List sheet (gspread, col AX = Deferred Until added 2026-04-30; no PR).
  
  dapp (PR #199):
  - store_interaction_history.html: new editDeferredUntil date input shown only when Status = "Deferred / Revisit later" (Status select change event toggles visibility).
  - Required + future-date validation moved from editFollowUpDate to editDeferredUntil.
  - [RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT] payload includes "Deferred Until: <date>" line.
  - populateUpdateFormFromHitList reads the new column from hit_list dict with deferred_until alias.
  
  tokenomics (PR #267):
  - google_app_scripts/find_nearby_stores/process_retail_field_reports_telegram_logs.gs passes fields.deferred_until as the 19th arg to updateStoreStatus.
  - google_app_scripts/find_nearby_stores/process_deferred_auto_flip.gs cron now reads Deferred Until column instead of Follow Up Date. parseDeferredFollowUpDate_ helper retains its name (logic identical) so the migration is a localized change.
  
  Code.js (clasp_mirror, gitignored):
  - updateStoreStatus signature gains deferredUntil 19th param.
  - find/update Deferred Until column via existing updateFieldIfProvided helper.
  - clasp push + clasp deploy (deployment AKfycbwB...) version 33.
  
  Why this design (recap from earlier turn):
  - Single-purpose column avoids ambiguity where an operator going Manager Follow-up → Deferred without retyping the date could accidentally trigger an immediate auto-flip on a stale Follow Up reminder.
  - Auto-flip cron stays at 03:00 daily; Manager Follow-up is the resurface state per Gary's earlier choice.
  
  Operator setup remaining (one-time): from the find_nearby_stores Apps Script editor (https://script.google.com/home/projects/1NpHrKJW8Q4suu6-f5gXQcbjHqUZtGOG-KcIf81M1GG8lDShm5-fLphD2/edit), pick installDeferredAutoFlipTrigger from the function dropdown and click Run. Approves OAuth scopes for the trigger.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/199
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/267
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
